VBA-JSON — JSON Converter for VBA
Source:  https://github.com/VBA-tools/VBA-JSON
Version: v2.3.1
Author:  Tim Hall (tim.hall.engr@gmail.com)

This file (JsonConverter.bas) is included in the SEC EDGAR XBRL Excel Add-in
repository for ease of installation. It is redistributed under its original
MIT license, unchanged from the upstream source.

used under a BSD license. The original BSD license text appears inside
JsonConverter.bas itself.
